titleEn: USDA forecast for broiler production raised for 2026
titleZh: 美国农业部上调2026年肉鸡产量预测
summaryZh: 美国农业部最新报告显示，2026年3月美国肉鸡产量同比增长9.5%，一季度总产量达119.66亿磅，同比增长3.7%。全年产量预测上调至491.46亿磅，较4月预测增加2.46亿磅。2027年产量预计达496亿磅，将实现连续第15年增长，但增速为2023年以来最慢。
featuredReason: 该新闻反映了美国肉鸡产业的持续扩张趋势，虽然与智慧畜牧技术直接关联度不高，但产量持续增长为行业自动化、智能化升级提供了市场基础，值得关注长期趋势。
contentFull: Markets & policy Market trends USDA forecast for broiler production raised for 2026 Output expected to grow for 15th consecutive year in 2027 12 June 2026 1 minute read By: Global Ag Media North America Monthly broiler production in the US for March totalled 4,160 million pounds, up 9.5% from March 2025, according to the USDA's latest Livestock, Dairy and Poultry Outlook.The increase in production is driven primarily by an 8.3% year-over-year increase in the number of birds slaughtered, but also by a 0.9% increase in average weights. Total broiler production for the first quarter of 2026 is 11,966 million pounds, a 3.7% year-over-year increase.Projected second-quarter broiler production was revised 50 million pounds higher in the May World Agricultural Supply and Demand Estimates report (WASDE) to 12,250 million pounds, while third-quarter broiler production was raised 100 million pounds to 12,600 million pounds to reflect growing layer numbers for broiler hatching eggs. Projected fourth-quarter production remained unchanged this month at 12,300 million pounds.These changes leave broiler production for 2026 at 49,146 million pounds, up 246 million pounds from the April projection and up 2.4% from 2025.The outlook for broiler production in 2027 is projected at 49,600 million pounds, up 0.9% from the 2026 projection. The increase in production for 2027 is expected to mark the 15th consecutive year of production growth, although this growth rate would be the slowest since 2023. translationZh:
根据美国农业部最新发布的《畜牧、乳制品及家禽展望》，2026年3月美国肉鸡月产量为41.6亿磅，较2025年3月增长9.5%。

产量增长主要受屠宰量同比增长8.3%推动，同时平均体重也增加了0.9%。2026年第一季度肉鸡总产量为119.66亿磅，同比增长3.7%。

在5月发布的《世界农业供需预测报告》中，第二季度肉鸡产量预测上调5000万磅至122.5亿磅，第三季度产量预测上调1亿磅至126亿磅，以反映肉鸡种蛋存栏量的增长。本月第四季度产量预测保持不变，仍为123亿磅。

这些调整使得2026年全年肉鸡产量达到491.46亿磅，较4月预测增加2.46亿磅，较2025年增长2.4%。

2027年肉鸡产量展望为496亿磅，较2026年预测增长0.9%。2027年的产量增长预计将标志着连续第15年实现增长，尽管这一增速将是2023年以来最慢的。
contentHtml:
USDA forecast for broiler production raised for 2026 
Output expected to grow for 15th consecutive year in 2027
